name: Georg Cantor
title: Mathematician
bio: German mathematician who created set theory and established the importance of one-to-one correspondence between sets, defining infinite and well-ordered sets.
faith: A devout Lutheran who believed his theory of transfinite numbers was communicated to him by God. He saw the absolute infinite as an expression of the nature of God.

sources.title: Georg Cantor — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his belief that God communicated set theory to him

tagline: Explored the infinite in mathematics as a reflection of God's infinity
